当然，浏览器也可以打开 HTML 文件，但是整个交互链路太复杂、太长了，体验很糟糕。

items.title_en: Filing shows Shanghai-based MiniMax has begun preparations for a Chinese IPO; the AI company listed in Hong Kong in January and says its ARR has reached $300M (Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 文件显示，总部位于上海的 MiniMax 已开始为中国 IPO 做准备；这家人工智能公司 1 月份在香港上市，表示其 ARR 已达到 3 亿美元（彭博社）

items.title: After hitting their annual AI budget in months or seeing their AI bills double or triple due to "tokenmaxxing", some companies are rationing or tracking AI use (Bradley Olson/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_original: After hitting their annual AI budget in months or seeing their AI bills double or triple due to "tokenmaxxing", some companies are rationing or tracking AI use (Bradley Olson/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_en: After hitting their annual AI budget in months or seeing their AI bills double or triple due to "tokenmaxxing", some companies are rationing or tracking AI use (Bradley Olson/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_zh: 在几个月内达到年度人工智能预算或看到人工智能账单因“tokenmaxxing”而增加一倍或三倍后，一些公司开始定量配给或跟踪人工智能的使用（Bradley Olson/华尔街日报）
items.title_bilingual: 在几个月内达到年度人工智能预算或看到人工智能账单因“tokenmaxxing”而增加一倍或三倍后，一些公司开始定量配给或跟踪人工智能的使用（Bradley Olson/华尔街日报） / After hitting their annual AI budget in months or seeing their AI bills double or triple due to "tokenmaxxing", some companies are rationing or tracking AI use (Bradley Olson/Wall Street Journal)
